Cartoon

Copied

The 33rd Summer Olympic Games are underway in Paris, France, uniting people from all around the world. The Olympic spirit represents mutual understanding, friendship, unity, and fair competition. It acts as a bridge, bringing together people from all over the world and fostering respect, tolerance and understanding.

(To submit cartoons and share story ideas or feedback on ourcartoon page, please contact us atcartoon_opinions@cgtn.com)
